title: myosotis sylvatica subsp. sylvatica
intro: Myosotis sylvatica subsp. sylvatica, also known as Wood Forget-me-not or Wood Bluebells, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the borage family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Wood Forget-me-not include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory symptoms, and acting as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, allowing for various methods of consumption to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
